policy: Synthetic labels are product hypotheses. Rows below are diagnostic mismatches, not claims about real players.

profiles.name: Systems architect
profiles.hypothesis: Prefers strategic planning, simulation and difficult systems; avoids reflex-first action and annual sports loops.

profiles.name: Cozy social player
profiles.hypothesis: Prefers warm low-pressure play, creativity and approachable co-op; avoids horror, punishing challenge and graphic action.
